zh.lifeSummary: 當Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht於大約1310年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯時，他的父親Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht33歲，母親Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent27歲。他與Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1351年被列為schepen , zegel in zilver。他去世於1372年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht于大约1310年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯时，他的父亲Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht33岁，母亲Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent27岁。他与Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1351年被列为schepen , zegel in zilver。他去世于1372年之后。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht was born about 1310, in 's-Hertogenbosch, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, was 33 and his mother, Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent, was 27. He married Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. In 1351, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as schepen , zegel in zilver. He died after 1372.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht est né environ 1310, à 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. En 1351, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est schepen , zegel in zilver. Il est décédé après 1372.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht um 1310 in 's-Hertogenbosch, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht 33 und seine Mutter Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent 27. Er hat Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1351, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als schepen , zegel in zilver aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1372.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht è nato il circa 1310 nel 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1351, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come schepen , zegel in zilver. Morì dopo il 1372.

ja.lifeSummary: Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrechtが約1310年にオランダノオルド-ブラバント'ス-ハートジェンボッシュで生まれた時，父Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrechtは33歳，母Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gentは27歳であった。Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1351年，42歳の時，職業はschepen , zegel in zilverと記録されている。彼は1372年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht(이)가 대략 1310년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 '스-헤르토겐보슈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1351년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 schepen , zegel in zilver이었다. 그는 1372년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1351, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como schepen , zegel in zilver. Ele faleceu após 1372.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht родился около 1310 г. в местности 'с-хиртодженбощ, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Ridder en Heer van Nuland Albert Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Jan Macharius van den Bossche, van Gent, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1351 году, в возрасте 42 лет,  он работал по профессии schepen , zegel in zilver. Он умер после 1372 г.

Se casó con Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas.
